mapper.select: SELECT CHAMP_NO AS champNo, CHAMP_NAME AS champName, CHAMP_POSITION AS champPosition, CHAMP_ROLES AS champRoles, CHAMP_IMG AS champImg, CHAMP_INTRO AS champIntro, CHAMP_NAME AS id FROM CHAMP_INFO ORDER BY CHAMP_NAME ASC

SELECT C.CHAMP_NO, C.CHAMP_NAME, C.CHAMP_IMG, C.CHAMP_INTRO, CASE WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%assassin%' THEN '암살자' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%fighter%' THEN '전사' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%mage%' THEN '마법사' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%marksman%' THEN '원거리 딜러' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%support%' THEN '서포터' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%tank%' THEN '탱커' ELSE C.CHAMP_POSITION END as CHAMP_POSITION, S.*, K.CHAMP_SKIN_NO, K.CHAMP_SKIN_NAME, K.CHAMP_SKIN_IMG FROM CHAMP_INFO C LEFT JOIN CHAMP_SKILLS_INFO S ON C.CHAMP_NO = S.CHAMP_NO LEFT JOIN CHAMP_SKIN_INFO K ON C.CHAMP_NO = K.CHAMP_NO WHERE C.CHAMP_NO = #{champNo}

SELECT R.CHAMP_NO, I1.ITEM_NAME as ITEM1_NAME, I1.ITEM_IMG as ITEM1_IMG, I2.ITEM_NAME as ITEM2_NAME, I2.ITEM_IMG as ITEM2_IMG, I3.ITEM_NAME as ITEM3_NAME, I3.ITEM_IMG as ITEM3_IMG, T1.TALENT_NAME as RUNE1_NAME, T1.TALENT_IMG as RUNE1_IMG, T2.TALENT_NAME as RUNE2_NAME, T2.TALENT_IMG as RUNE2_IMG, T3.TALENT_NAME as RUNE3_NAME, T3.TALENT_IMG as RUNE3_IMG, T4.TALENT_NAME as RUNE4_NAME, T4.TALENT_IMG as RUNE4_IMG FROM CHAMP_RECOMMEND_INFO R LEFT JOIN LOL_ITEM_INFO I1 ON R.ITEM_NO_1 = I1.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN LOL_ITEM_INFO I2 ON R.ITEM_NO_2 = I2.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN LOL_ITEM_INFO I3 ON R.ITEM_NO_3 = I3.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN TALENT_INFO T1 ON R.TALENT_NO_1 = T1.TALENT_NO LEFT JOIN TALENT_INFO T2 ON R.TALENT_NO_2 = T2.TALENT_NO LEFT JOIN TALENT_INFO T3 ON R.TALENT_NO_3 = T3.TALENT_NO LEFT JOIN TALENT_INFO T4 ON R.TALENT_NO_4 = T4.TALENT_NO WHERE R.CHAMP_NO = #{champNo}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO CHAMP_RECOMMEND_INFO R USING DUAL ON (R.CHAMP_NO = #{champNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ITEM_NO_1 = #{itemNo1}, ITEM_NO_2 = #{itemNo2}, ITEM_NO_3 = #{itemNo3}, TALENT_NO_1 = #{talentNo1}, TALENT_NO_2 = #{talentNo2}, TALENT_NO_3 = #{talentNo3}, TALENT_NO_4 = #{talentNo4} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CHAMP_NO, ITEM_NO_1, ITEM_NO_2, ITEM_NO_3, TALENT_NO_1, TALENT_NO_2, TALENT_NO_3, TALENT_NO_4 ) VALUES ( #{champNo}, #{itemNo1}, #{itemNo2}, #{itemNo3}, #{talentNo1}, #{talentNo2}, #{talentNo3}, #{talentNo4} )
INSERT INTO LOL_ITEM_INFO (ITEM_NO, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_PRICE, ITEM_INFO, ITEM_IMG, ITEM_TAG) VALUES (#{itemNo}, #{itemName}, #{itemPrice}, #{itemInfo}, #{itemImg}, #{itemTag})

MERGE INTO RECOMMEND_BUILD USING DUAL ON (CHAMP_NO = #{champNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ITEM_NO1 = #{itemNo1}, ITEM_NO2 = #{itemNo2}, ITEM_NO3 = #{itemNo3}, TALENT_NO1 = #{talentNo1}, TALENT_NO2 = #{talentNo2}, TALENT_NO3 = #{talentNo3}, TALENT_NO4 = #{talentNo4} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CHAMP_NO, ITEM_NO1, ITEM_NO2, ITEM_NO3, TALENT_NO1, TALENT_NO2, TALENT_NO3, TALENT_NO4) VALUES (#{champNo}, #{itemNo1}, #{itemNo2}, #{itemNo3}, #{talentNo1}, #{talentNo2}, #{talentNo3}, #{talentNo4})
